blended.narrative: Grand Targhee is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,250 ft. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 64".
